In April 2026, industrial producer prices grew by 0.7% in the euro area and by 0.8% in the EU. In May 2026, compared with May 2025, industrial producer ... Volume of retail trade up by 0.2% in the euro area and by 0.5% in the EU From ec.europa.eu | 17 min ago In May 2026, compared with April 2026, the seasonally adjusted retail trade volume increased by 0.2% in the euro area and by 0.5% in the EU, according to first estimates from Eurostat, the statistical office of the European Union. In April 2026, retail trade volume fell by 0.3% in the euro area and by 0.6% in the EU. In May 2026, compared with May 2025, the ... UK: Subdued construction sector performance continues in June From pmi.spglobal.com | 44 min ago UK construction companies recorded further sharp declines in output and new orders during June. However, both rates of contraction eased from May's six-year records. Cost pressures moderated in June and supply chain disruptions were notably less acute than in April and May. The seasonally adjusted S&P Global UK Construction Purchasing Managers’ Index™ ... Sentix: Germany is following suit From sentix.de | 46 min ago The sentix Economic Sentiment Index is sending out a positive signal in July: the economic outlook for the euro-zone is brightening noticeably, underpinned by a marked improvement in expectations and growing investor confidence. Germany, in particular, is providing a boost, as the latest political measures appear to be building confidence and noticeably ... latestLead.pageDescription: HFM Global review: 1,000+ instruments, MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5, up to 1:2000 leverage and a $0 minimum deposit. CFDs carry risk.
latestLead.pageText: CFDs are complex instruments and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. Trade only with money you can afford to lose. HFMGlobal Download for PCMobile AppRegistrationContact Us Open HFM Account → HFM — global online brokerTrade Forex & CFDs with HFMHFM offers 1,000+ instruments across forex, stocks, indices, etfs, metals, commodities, crypto, bonds on MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5, with up to 1:2000 leverage, 1.0 pips spreads and a $0 minimum deposit.Open HFM Account →Min deposit $0 · Up to 1:2000 · Rating 4.3/5HFM is a forex and CFD broker founded in 2010, regulated by the FCA, FSCA, DFSA and CySEC. It offers 1,000+ instruments across forex, stocks, indices, etfs, metals, commodities, crypto, bonds on MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5, with a $0 minimum deposit, up to 1:2000 leverage and fast market execution.$0Min depositUp to 1:2000Max leverage1,000+Instruments2010FoundedWhy traders choose HFMEstablished in 2010 (rebranded to HFM in 2022) and multi-regulated by the FCA, FSCA, DFSA and CySECNo minimum deposit on most accounts; Micro from just $5High leverage up to 1:2000 on MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 51,000+ instruments plus HFcopy copy trading and a swap-free optionZero accounts with raw spreads from 0.0 pipsHFM accounts at a glanceAccountPlatformSpread fromCommissionBest forPremiumMT4/MT51.0 pips$0No-commission tradingZeroMT4/MT50.0 pips$6/lot round-turnRaw spreadsMicroMT4/MT51.0 pips$0Beginners ($5 min)Open HFM Account →Explore HFMDownload for PCMetaTrader 4 & 5 for Windows, macOS and Linux.Mobile AppTrade on iOS and Android, synced to your account.RegistrationOpen an HFM account step by step.Contact UsReach HFM support 24/5 via chat, email and phone.More: download for PC, mobile app, registration, contact us.HFM Global — quick verdictHFM, founded in 2010 and regulated by the FCA, FSCA, DFSA and CySEC, is a forex and CFD broker offering 1,000+ instruments and up to 1:2000 leverage on MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5. Independent reviews are on its Trustpilot page. CFDs are complex instruments and carry a high risk of losing money.Open HFM Account →Frequently asked questionsIs HFM good for beginners?HFM offers a free demo, a $0 minimum deposit and MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5, which suit new traders who manage risk carefully.What is the minimum deposit at HFM?The minimum deposit is $0 on most accounts.What leverage does HFM offer?Up to 1:2000 on major forex pairs. Ready to trade with HFM in Global? Open HFM Account → HomeDownload for PCMobile AppRegistrationContact Us CFDs are complex instruments and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. Trade only with money you can afford to lose. Content is for informational purposes only and is not financial advice. Always verify current terms before trading. © 2026 HFM Global.
